title: Semi-Charmed Life
why_this_song: Semi-Charmed Life by Third Eye Blind (1997) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I want somethin' else"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I want somethin' else"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I want somethin' else"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Keep on smilin' what we go through"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somethin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "somethin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Then I bumped again, I said
Those days you were wearing that velvet dress

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm smilin', she's livin', she's golden
I'm not listenin' when you say
Those little red panties they pass the test

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Semi-Charmed Life" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Semi-Charmed Life"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Third Eye Blind one question about "Semi-Charmed Life", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Third Eye Blind sobre "Semi-Charmed Life", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Semi-Charmed Life" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Semi-Charmed Life" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
